title: Mythic Tinkers
description: Adds Tinkers Construct support to Alex's Caves. Also adds 6 new end game materials found in Alex's Caves.
body:
# Mythic Tinkers
Mythic Tinkers is a Tinkers Construct addon that adds support for Alex's Caves as well as adds 6 powerful, endgame materials. Each cave biome has its own unique ore with its own unique way of obtaining it.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/rKfkMdoyWmY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Byzantium Neodymium
Generates in Magnetic Caves. When used in a tool, allows you to bind that tool to a chest or other container. Harvest materials are automatically teleported to that container.

## Tectellus
Generates in Primordial Caves. The Luxtructiosaurus boss must be active for this ore to be mined. When added to your tool, the break speed of naturally generating stone blocks is significantly decreased.

## Element 122
Generates in Toxic Caves. Can only be mined with a Tremorzilla beam or a nuclear blast. Provides exceptional stats to your tool, but makes your tool decay overtime, which makes you irradiated.

## Aurichalcum
Generates in the Abyssal Chasm. Can be found by smelting down Atlantean Ruins. WHen added to your tool, it allows you to give your tool the traits of two other materials from this mod.

## Prosprum
Obtained by using pure light to purify Desolum, the material obtained by smelting down Desolate Daggers. When added to your weapon, attacking an enemy inflicts them with the "Marked for Death" debuff. When you swing your weapon near an enemy with Marked for Death, you apply a second attack onto them.

## Gumbronze
Obtained by alloying Amethyst Bronze with Earthen Gum: a resource found in the Candy Cavity. When added to your tool, it will break less depending on how full you are, with 9 or more hunger points preventing your tool from taking damage entirely.
